'''Gareth Owen''' (born 3 July 1992) is an English former professional [[rugby league]] footballer who played mainly as a {{rlp|HK}} for [[Salford City Reds]], [[Sheffield Eagles]] and [[Oldham R.L.F.C.|Oldham]].

==Background==
Owen was born in [[Oldham]], [[Greater Manchester]], England.

==Playing career==
In August 2010, Owen made his debut for [[Salford City Reds]] against [[Hull Kingston Rovers]].<ref>{{cite web|url=http://news.bbc.co.uk/sport1/hi/rugby_league/super_league/8908233.stm |title=Salford City Reds 18-44 Hull Kingston Rovers |work=BBC Sport |date=15 August 2010 |access-date=6 May 2026}}</ref>  In 2014, Owen spent time on loan at [[Sheffield Eagles]] where he made 15 appearances, before joining [[Oldham R.L.F.C.|Oldham]] on loan for the remainder of the season.<ref>{{cite web|url=https://www.loverugbyleague.com/post/sheffield-lose-owen-and-add-uaisele |title=Sheffield lose Owen and add Uaisele |website=Love Rugby League |date=26 July 2014 |access-date=6 May 2026}}</ref>

Owen's move to Oldham was made permanent ahead of the 2015 season,<ref>{{cite web|url=https://www.loverugbyleague.com/post/gareth-owen-joins-oldham |title=Gareth Owen joins Oldham |website=Love Rugby League |date=19 November 2014 |access-date=6 May 2026}}</ref> and he was appointed team captain in 2017.<ref>{{cite web|url=https://www.loverugbyleague.com/post/owen-honoured-to-lead-oldham |title=Owen honoured to lead Oldham |website=Love Rugby League |date=10 January 2017 |access-date=6 May 2026}}</ref> In September 2021, Owen announced that he would retire at the end on the 2021 season.<ref>{{cite web|url=https://www.theoldhamtimes.co.uk/sport/roughyeds/19568911.oldham-captain-gareth-owen-announces-retirement/ |title=Oldham captain Gareth Owen announces his retirement |work=The Oldham Times |date=9 September 2021 |access-date=6 May 2026}}</ref>

After retiring from professional rugby league, Owen joined local amateur side Waterhead Warriors.<ref>{{cite web|url=https://www.bbc.co.uk/sport/rugby-league/articles/cn7ggzev3v2o |title=Community clubs have chance to shine in Challenge Cup |work=BBC Sport |date=17 January 2025 |access-date=6 May 2026}}</ref>
